pages.title: Bone Age
pages.text: Now, you can &6smash&r your well-earned &lbones&r against a hard surface again, to get &ebone blades&r. With these, you can craft your &cbone tool set&r in the &2crafting stone&r.

pages.title: The Crafting Stone - Part 1
pages.text:
You may have noticed rocks around in the world. Pick them up! They are useful ranged weapons, but also a key in your progression towards a &2crafting stone&r.
Place 4 in your crafting grid in your inventory &e{key:key.inventory}&r, to get a full block.

pages.title: The Crafting Stone - Part 2
pages.text:
Use &b{key:key.use}&r a blade/knife on a crafted rock block to get a crafting stone.
Place sticks, fiber, and bone blades, and browse the arrows to make your tools!

&b{key:key.use}&r on the preview will automatically add all items required for the recipe from your inventory, and will auto-craft the item. You can always add them yourself and &b{key:key.sneak}+{key:key.use}&r the block to craft it yourself.
